description_long: This humanoid robot features a sleek, segmented body with articulated limbs and a rounded head. Its exterior is primarily white with black and gray joint accents, and a prominent red section on the abdomen displaying a yellow and black hazard symbol. The robot's arms and legs are jointed at the shoulders, elbows, wrists, hips, knees, and ankles, allowing for a wide range of motion. The face is simple, with two light blue eyes and a smooth, expressionless surface, while the back of the head and neck show mechanical detailing. The overall design is functional and industrial, suggesting durability and adaptability for urban environments.
description: A white, articulated humanoid robot with a red hazard-marked abdomen and simple, expressive face. Its segmented limbs and mechanical joints suggest high mobility and durability.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's face, blue eyes, outstretched arms, and red hazard-marked abdomen.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the robot's profile, joint articulation, and mechanical neck details.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the head, neck mechanisms, and the segmented structure of the limbs and torso.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing limb articulation and the side profile of the head and torso.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and parallel, head facing forward, and torso upright.
attribute_clothing_style: Unclothed; exterior consists of integrated panels and mechanical joints with no visible fabric or decorative coverings.
attribute_facial_features: Face is smooth and white with two light blue circular eyes, no visible mouth or nose, and no expressive elements or display screens.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have visible hinge or rotary joints at shoulders, elbows, wrists, hips, knees, and ankles, allowing for flexible movement; limbs appear segmented and articulated.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Visible sensors include two eye-like cameras or optical sensors on the face; no other sensors are clearly visible.
